flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 41% at Henderson State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.5k vs 2.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Henderson State University fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2k → 1.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Henderson State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Henderson State University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (23.9% → 27.2%).
